ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by plaintiff's counsel; Tina Li, Esq. appearing for defendant Hertz Corporation. Plaintiff' counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jan-14-2020 at 10:30am in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
